sections.paragraph:
with suff. דִּגְלֹו, plural דְּגָלִים const. דִּגְלֵי masc. a large military standard, that of each of the four camps into which the twelve tribes were divided; the smaller being called אֹתֹות. Num 1:52 2:2 , , 10 , 18 , 25 10:14 , 25 Num 10:25 Son 2:4, וִדִגְלֹו עָלַי אַהֲבָה “and his banner over me (was) love.”
